name: swarm-pi-code-plugin
description: Dual-host Pi workflows with durable Host Assistance, discovery, review, and isolated implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate bounded, evidence-backed work to Pi.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex and Claude Code to controlled Pi sessions for live Host-assisted research, schema-gated discovery, reviews, and verified isolated changes.
defaultPrompt: Use Pi to review the current changes.
Use Pi to plan this implementation.
Use Pi to implement this scoped change.
Use Pi to investigate this unknown with a reproducible experiment.
